content.en:
"The ordinary Red Sky Blood Golden Grass is useless to me, but it is very useful to those high-level realm gods of the human race, and that Red Sky Blood Golden Grass extradimensional creature is definitely of great use to me!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

His target this time was the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass extradimensional creatures, and he just took away the other Red Sky Blood Golden Grass.

Once he kills the extradimensional creature of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, this one extradimensional creature alone will be enough to help him break the shackles in the future and condense the eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit, and even help his relatives condense the Eleventh Eternal Realm Spirit, maybe it will be more than enough.

Such an extra-dimensional creature is a top-level extra-dimensional resource!

How could he let go of such an extra-dimensional resource!

Of course, he also knew very well that his current strength should still be inferior to the Chitian Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creature, but as long as he paid enough price, even if it was hard to consume, he would have the hope of consuming the Chitian Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creature.

"Six replica bodies, almost, you can pass!"

Ye Tian's six copy bodies instantly killed the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creatures.

At this moment, the extradimensional creature of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass sensed Ye Tian's arrival, and the huge body appeared, and it continued to spread, and the terrifying extradimensional power condensed 05 out of grass to tear the void of death.

Ye Tian's pupils shrank, and only then did he realize that the original Red Sky Blood Golden Grass did not attack that high-level peak realm god with all its strength, and now it was really showing its strength, and each of these grasses was enough to instantly kill an ordinary peak realm god.

"Starwing Six-Armed Shield!"

One by one, the star-winged six-arm shield appeared, protecting Ye Tian under the blessing of the superdimensional power.

This time, he had refined a large number of Star Wing Six-Arm Shields, far more than the last time he fought with the Yonghao Realm God.

The dense star-winged six-armed shield forms a dense defense, which is used to resist the attacks of the extradimensional creatures of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass.

Puff puff puff!!!

The layers of star-winged six-armed shields were pierced until they had penetrated sixteen layers of defense, and then they were blocked.

"What a terrifying attack, the attack of the Yonghao Realm God is far inferior to this extra-dimensional creature!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After all, his current cultivation is much stronger than at the beginning, and the effect of urging the Super Dimensional Secret Treasure will naturally be better.

If the Yonghao Realm God was still alive, it would be very good to be able to break his defense of a layer of Star Wings and Six Arms Shield now, but this Red Sky Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creature could penetrate the sixteenth layer of defense with a single blow, how terrifying this was.

If it is the god of Yonghao Realm, he will be pierced through the flesh with one blow, even if he does not die, he will be injured a lot, and it is estimated that he will be killed if he can't hold it for long.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian's six replica bodies resisted the attack of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, and performed a superdimensional technique to attack the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass.

However, his attack was too damaging for the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass extradimensional creatures.

However, he still ordered to attack the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass.

Suddenly, one of his duplicate bodies was still pierced through all of his defenses, and the injuries were not light.

But he didn't care at all, and the Burning Eternal Dao Seed fought desperately.

Soon after, the replica was almost discontinued.

He didn't let this replica body sacrifice, once sacrificed, the Super Secret Treasure would be lost, and he wouldn't have time to pick it up.

Thereupon.

His duplicate body immediately withdrew from the battlefield, and soon another replica body appeared, took all the super dimensional secret treasures, and put them into the body without hindrance, regaining control of these super dimensional secret treasures, and the seriously injured copy body dissolved itself.

In this way, Ye Tian's replica body participated in the battle, and once it was about to be scrapped, it would come out.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian scrapped a lot of replica bodies, but the injuries of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creatures were gradually getting worse.

"It's such a terrifying Red Sky Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creature, I still underestimate it, if all the peak realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace come over, don't even think about killing the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creature if the whole army is wiped out!" Ye Tian estimated.

Before you know it, a long time has passed.

And many of Ye Tian's star-winged six-armed shields were about to be completely scrapped, and they were the kind that could not be repaired.

However, he didn't care at all, scrapped and scrapped, even if there was some loss, he didn't care, once he killed this extradimensional creature, the gain would definitely far exceed the loss.

Finally this day.

The Red Sky Blood Golden Grass Extradimensional Creature was already crumbling, covered in thousands of holes, and it was difficult to recover, obviously about to reach its limit. []

"Soon, it's going to die!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

So, he killed even harder.

After another moment, the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creature was about to fall.

But just as it was about to fall, it performed some kind of ultimate.

Rumble!!!!

The endless light tore through everything, and Ye Tian's four replica bodies were killed in an instant, and the six star wings and six-armed shields were directly and completely destroyed.

But after performing this trick, the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass completely fell.

"What a terrifying move, this is an attack that instantly bursts out the power of the whole body, condenses the power of the super dimension to the extreme, and the attack power surpasses the peak by at least five times more!" Ye Tian secretly exclaimed.

If it were replaced by other supreme forces, he would definitely lose everything under this move, but he only lost four complex 690 body and six star wings and six arm shields, which was still within the acceptable range.

Of course, in this big battle, his overall loss is not small.

But as soon as he thought of these Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, he didn't care anymore, but smiled.

Wow!

Ye Tian came to the corpse of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass and collected this Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, and then collected other ordinary Red Sky Blood Golden Grass as well.

Although the other Chitian Blood Golden Grass also had some spiritual intelligence, they were not extra-dimensional creatures, and they did not have too strong combat power, and they were wiped out of consciousness by Ye Tian one by one and put away one by one.

In a short time, these hundreds of Red Heaven Blood Golden Grass had already fallen into Ye Tian's hands.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian cast the Transcendent Realm Wood Escape Light and quickly returned to the Endless Realm Rift Realm.

After coming back, Ye Tian put those ordinary Red Sky Blood Golden Grass into the Terran Temple, and set a standard, if he reached the standard and paid a certain contribution value, he could exchange it for Red Sky Blood Golden Grass.

Of course.

This Red Sky Blood Golden Grass extradimensional creature naturally belonged to him, and he wouldn't take it out.

"The Red Sky Blood Golden Grass helps to condense the Eternal Realm Spirit, but it is of little use for refining the Eternal Dao Seed, it is not needed at the moment, wait for the Eternal Dao Seed to be raised to the limit, and then use it to break through the cultivation realm!"

Ye Tian planned.
